summary: Field footage of an ICE arrest operation in a daytime parking lot near a gas station. An officer wearing a vest marked 'POLICE' with a radio, face blurred, speaks to camera in the foreground while marked and unmarked vehicles and fuel pumps are visible behind him. The audio includes officers coordinating before and during the arrest. The tweet text identifies the subject as a man from Haiti arrested in Riviera Beach, Florida with prior convictions.

script.scene: Officer in a 'POLICE' vest with radio, face blurred, speaks to camera in a gas-station parking lot with marked vehicles behind.
